name: Smoked Salmon with Brown Soda Bread
recipeIngredient: 3 cups torn greens (such as red leaf lettuce, frisee and arugula)
1 lb thinly sliced smoked salmon (such as Irish, Scottish or Norwegian)
24 red cherry tomatoes or pear tomatoes
24 yellow pear tomatoes or cherry tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Divide greens among plates.
2. Top with salmon.
3. Sprinkle with capers.
4. Garnish with onions and tomatoes.
5. Drizzle with oil.
6. Serve with lemon wedges, bread, and butter.
